title: Open the Cost Management and Billing app

blocks.content: The Cost Management and Billing app is your central hub for understanding usage and costs across your Grafana Cloud organization. It replaces the older Billing/Usage dashboard and brings spend tracking, cost attribution, usage alerts, and invoices together in one place.

blocks.title: Open the app and find your spend overview

blocks.content: In this section, you'll open the Cost Management and Billing app and locate the overview of your current spend. Sign in to your Grafana Cloud instance first, for example `mystack.grafana.net`.
Open the **Cost Management and Billing** app. It opens on the **Usage** tab, which shows your current spend and usage.
The **Usage** tab is where you track current spend and per-product usage.
The **Cost and Usage Overview** summarizes your spend balance and contract burndown for the current period.
The **Contract Burndown** chart compares your committed spend against your cumulative usage cost over time.
You opened the app and located your spend overview on the **Usage** tab.

blocks.alt: The Cost Management and Billing app on the Usage tab, showing the tab bar and the Cost and Usage Overview with current billable usage cost

blocks.content:
## Find your way around

The app organizes billing and usage information into tabs:

- **Usage**: Your current spend balance, contract burndown, and a per-product breakdown of usage and cost.
- **Cardinality**: Tools to analyze metrics cardinality, a common driver of metrics cost.
- **Attributions**: Usage and cost broken down by your configured cost attribution labels, so you can assign spend to teams or services.
- **Usage Alerts**: Create and manage alerts that notify you when usage or cost approaches a threshold.
- **Invoices**: View and download your monthly invoices.

The roles you have determine which tabs you can see. For example, viewing usage requires the **Billing and usage reader** role.

## Read the Usage tab

Below the **Cost and Usage Overview**, the **Product Breakdown** section lists each billable product, such as Metrics, Logs, Traces, and k6, with its current usage and cost.
By default the Usage tab shows the current billing period. Use the controls at the top of the page to change the period when you want to compare months or align with your billing cycle.
In the next milestone, you'll use the Product Breakdown to identify which products contribute most to your monthly costs.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Understand your Grafana Cloud invoice](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/cost-management-and-billing/manage-invoices/understand-your-invoice/)
